servicesPage.title: Our Services
servicesPage.subtitle: Providing a comprehensive suite of cross-border solutions to ensure your India-Japan business success.

marketEntry.title: Market Entry Support
marketEntry.subtitle: Navigating regulatory and cultural landscapes with confidence.
marketEntry.para1: Expanding your business to a new country is a monumental step. JIBB simplifies this transition for Japanese companies entering India and Indian enterprises expanding to Japan.
marketEntry.para2: We provide clear, actionable go-to-market strategies, business registrations, physical office setups, and deep regulatory navigations customized to your specific industry.
marketEntry.step1Desc: Custom commercial intelligence, feasibility assessments, and step-by-step entry roadmaps.
marketEntry.step2Desc: Business registrations, environmental clearances, licensing, and local tax structuring support.
marketEntry.step3Desc: Sourcing physical offices, local banking setup, and key vendor management.

partnership.title: Partnership Facilitation
partnership.subtitle: Forging trust-based, high-value industrial relationships.
partnership.para1: Finding the right local partner is the single most critical factor for long-term bilateral success. JIBB uses its extensive directory to connect you with trusted leaders.
partnership.para2: Whether you are searching for joint venture candidates, local manufacturing plants, technology co-developers, or trade buyers, we handle the entire match-making process.
partnership.step1Desc: Direct introductions to verified, high-quality partners aligning with your technical standards.
partnership.step2Desc: Structuring equitable bilateral collaborations with sound legal and operational frameworks.
partnership.step3Desc: Access to exclusive bilateral buyer-seller meets and corporate summits.

coInnovation.title: Co-Innovation Collaboration
coInnovation.subtitle: Facilitating joint R&D and technological breakthroughs.
coInnovation.para1: We actively facilitate joint projects between Indian and Japanese firms. By bringing diverse minds together, we help you share resources, reduce development costs, and create groundbreaking products for the global market.
coInnovation.para2: Our co-innovation framework covers everything from initial technology scouting and intellectual property agreements to shared lab facilities in our Innovation Hub.
coInnovation.step1Desc: Identifying complementary technological capabilities across borders.
coInnovation.step2Desc: Structuring IP sharing, research funding, and technical milestones.
coInnovation.step3Desc: Taking joint innovations from the lab directly to global markets.

investment.title: Investment Support & Joint Ventures
investment.subtitle: Securing capital channels and unlocking bilateral incentives.
investment.para1: JIBB assists corporations and startups in navigating funding schemes, identifying tax benefits, and connecting with leading institutional investors.
investment.para2: We help you tap into bilateral investment corridors, secure government incentives (such as India's PLI schemes), and structure high-value joint ventures.
investment.step1Desc: Pitching platforms connecting high-potential startups to Japanese VCs and Indian angel syndicates.
investment.step2Desc: Navigating capital subsidies, tax holidays, and production-linked incentives (PLI).
investment.step3Desc: Financial due diligence, structuring equitable bilateral collaborations, and capital transfer navigation.

diaspora.title: Diaspora Networking
diaspora.subtitle: Connecting the Indian diaspora with vibrant Japanese business opportunities.
diaspora.para1: We organize exclusive networking events to connect the Indian diaspora with vibrant Japanese business opportunities. These clubs foster mutual understanding and create strong, personal bonds that translate into professional success.
diaspora.para2: By leveraging the deep cultural and professional roots of the diaspora, we create a supportive ecosystem that accelerates cross-border integration.
diaspora.step1Desc: Curated networking dinners, cultural mixers, and business panels.
diaspora.step2Desc: Connecting established diaspora leaders with newcomers and startups.
diaspora.step3Desc: Providing resources and connections to help the diaspora thrive in the local business ecosystem.

howWeWork.title: How We Work
howWeWork.subtitle: A structured, three-phase operational methodology that transforms bilateral concepts into thriving corporate realities.

phase1.title: Phase 1: Planning
phase1.subtitle: Market entry, feasibility, and custom blueprints
items: Market Analysis: Addressable market, growth potential, and competitive dynamics.
Validation Visit: On-the-ground validation meets and operational site visits.
Entry Strategy: Formulating optimal organization and distribution structures.
Location Analysis: Regulatory, logistics, and resource benchmarking.
Outline Business Plan: Projecting sales, operational expenses, and profitability.

phase2.title: Phase 2: Project Execution
phase2.subtitle: Incorporation, setups, and recruitment
items: Regulatory & Statutory Approvals: Approvals and local clearance navigation.
Company Incorporation: Legal entity setup and registration.
Site & Land Selection: Sourcing, evaluating, and securing land.
Central & State Incentives: Tapping into PLI, subsidies, and tax holidays.
Project Management & Support: Sourcing vendors, warehouses, factories, and lab logistics.
Executive Search & HR: Recruitment of local engineers and directors.

phase3.title: Phase 3: Advisory
phase3.subtitle: Regulatory, sales, and HR expansion consulting
items: Compliance Updates: Policy tracking and representations to government ministries.
Sales Ramp-Up: Lead generation, marketing setup, and distributor matching.
HR & Retention: Benchmarking compensation, HR manuals, and retention policies.
